items.detail: Benchmark artifacts, prompt appendix, cached-response checks, evaluation scripts, and paper tables are present and integrity-checked.
items.plan_item: Contribution 1: PRAG-CrossPlay benchmark with scene generator, JSONL data, prompt templates, cached outputs, evaluation scripts, figures, and tables.

items.detail: Paper and artifact guide report same-play, cross-play, and gap values.
items.plan_item: Contribution 2: cross-play protocol separates same-play success, cross-play success, and generalization gap.

items.detail: Claims, mechanism audits, and coded failures support the partner-overfitting diagnosis.
items.plan_item: Contribution 3: empirical diagnosis of partner overfitting.

items.detail: All five scenario families are implemented and documented; partial observability is included as a bounded support run.
items.plan_item: Implement the five scenario families, with the first four as the minimum viable paper and partial observability as a stretch condition.

items.detail: A no-API 600-scene balanced local benchmark validates the released generator at the planned scale.
items.plan_item: Minimum viable benchmark scale: 600 test episodes balanced over four initial scenario families.

items.detail: The project uses a 50-scene dev/API pilot, not the 200 development episodes suggested by the stronger plan.
items.plan_item: Use development episodes for debugging prompts and tuning the generator.

items.detail: Minimum method matrix is present in both cached API pilot summaries and the 600-scene local benchmark.
items.plan_item: Run the minimum method matrix: template, direct, best-of-K, mirror self-play, population-play, and oracle upper bound.

items.detail: All cached API responses have usage metadata and the held-out listener prompt surface is documented.
items.plan_item: Use bounded API runs with cached speaker/listener calls and held-out listener prompts/models.

items.detail: Held-out prompt variants and the alternate gpt-4.1-nano listener audit are documented.
items.plan_item: Evaluate partner shift with held-out listener prompts and at least one alternate held-out model family.

items.detail: Hard-case diagnostics are present: perspective stress, no-coordinate ablations, candidate-budget audit, and partial observability.
items.plan_item: Add hard-case diagnostics if results are near ceiling: perspective stress, no-coordinate ablation, and partial observability.

items.detail: Objective success, gaps, CIs, and paired comparison claims are reported and verifier-covered.
items.plan_item: Report objective success, same-play, cross-play, cross-play gap, bootstrap confidence intervals, and paired comparisons.

items.detail: Listener-disagreement and confidence audits cover partner-robustness and ambiguity/confidence diagnostics.
items.plan_item: Analyze robustness across partners and ambiguity/confidence proxies.

items.detail: There are 152 author-coded listener-level mirror failures across paper-facing hard cases, but not a balanced 100-failure sample across all major methods.
items.plan_item: Hand-label roughly 100 failures into interpretable categories.

items.detail: Selection-regret and candidate-pool audits separate missing candidates from selector regret.
items.plan_item: Separate generation failures from selector failures with oracle upper bound and selection regret.

items.detail: Random-candidate and message-length audits address two simple alternative explanations.
items.plan_item: Rule out simple explanations such as any candidate would do or longer messages are enough.

items.detail: Paper and generated appendix include qualitative mirror-failure and repair examples.
items.plan_item: Produce qualitative examples showing mirror failure and population or consensus repair.

items.detail: Readiness audit confirms required sections, 8-page PDFs, final-template export, and no open actions.
items.plan_item: Write a 4-8 page workshop paper with intro, related work, task, methods, experiments, results, qualitative analysis, limitations, and conclusion.

items.detail: README, reproduction commands, prompt appendix, reviewer checklist, and artifact guide are present.
items.plan_item: Release a reproducible artifact package with README, protocol appendix, cached outputs, verification scripts, and quality checklist.

items.detail: Claim verifier passes and limitations/conservative-claim notes are explicit.
items.plan_item: Keep claims conservative and limitations honest.

items.detail: A no-API local diagnostic now runs the stronger 1,000 initial-family plus 200 partial-observability scale, but the paper-facing API listener runs remain bounded 50-scene diagnostics.
items.plan_item: Run a 1,000-scene benchmark and 200 partial-observability stress episodes.

items.detail: The API K=8 no-coordinate GPT-5.5 speaker audit evaluates 50 perspective-stress scenes, keeps 400/400 non-coordinate candidates, and shows population-play reaches 0.993 while oracle remains 1.000.
items.plan_item: Evaluate K=8 candidate generation in addition to K=4.

items.detail: A replay-only interaction-memory rule audit is present, but no new memory-prompt generation/evaluation run is claimed.
items.plan_item: Run an actual interaction-memory prompt rerun after distilling rules from failures.

items.detail: A cache-only rule-based verifier gives independent non-LLM support for the coded mirror-failure taxonomy; human validation remains a future extension.
items.plan_item: Validate failures with human or independent non-LLM judgments.

items.detail: The artifact package is in a git repository configured for the public GitHub release target.
items.plan_item: Publish the artifact as a public repository or submission bundle.

open_or_partial.detail: The project uses a 50-scene dev/API pilot, not the 200 development episodes suggested by the stronger plan.
open_or_partial.plan_item: Use development episodes for debugging prompts and tuning the generator.

open_or_partial.detail: There are 152 author-coded listener-level mirror failures across paper-facing hard cases, but not a balanced 100-failure sample across all major methods.
open_or_partial.plan_item: Hand-label roughly 100 failures into interpretable categories.

open_or_partial.detail: A no-API local diagnostic now runs the stronger 1,000 initial-family plus 200 partial-observability scale, but the paper-facing API listener runs remain bounded 50-scene diagnostics.
open_or_partial.plan_item: Run a 1,000-scene benchmark and 200 partial-observability stress episodes.

open_or_partial.detail: A replay-only interaction-memory rule audit is present, but no new memory-prompt generation/evaluation run is claimed.
open_or_partial.plan_item: Run an actual interaction-memory prompt rerun after distilling rules from failures.

status_definitions.covered: Current artifacts directly satisfy the plan item.
status_definitions.open: The item remains future work and is not claimed by the paper.
status_definitions.partial: Current artifacts address the item only at smaller scale, narrower scope, or as diagnostic support.
